description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a lush perimeter of trees and hedges, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade, and a mix of brick and white exterior finishes. The property includes a spacious driveway, a garage, and multiple outdoor living areas such as patios and a deck, with visible garden furniture and a red car parked on the premises. The landscaping is meticulously maintained, with green lawns, paved walkways, and a variety of shrubs and trees. The rear and side yards offer additional seating and recreational spaces, while the front is defined by a prominent entryway and a clear view of the main living area through expansive glass panels.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, brick and white exterior, surrounded by trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, entryway, driveway, and a red car parked near the garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor seating, and the back entrance with more greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the side patio, additional garden space, and the driveway extending to the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the main entrance, garage, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees along the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and grouped side windows
